summaryAm: እውነትን መናገር ለመተማመን እንደሚረዳ የሚያሳይ ታሪክ።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation with softened scary elements.

pages.textAm: ተኩላ መጣ ያለው ልጅ ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The Boy Who Cried Wolf story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A young shepherd watches sheep on a sunny hillside, with no scary imagery.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ እውነትን እና መተማመንን ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the truth and trust moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Villagers kindly listen to the child in a safe pastoral scene.

pages.textAm: ታሪኩ በትምህርት እና በአዲስ መጀመሪያ ይጨርሳል።
pages.textEn: The story will end with learning and a new beginning.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The child learns about honesty while caring for sheep peacefully.
